picks.quote: Going to be Max Bless to get it done. I think he ends up knocking him out sometime after the second round.
But the reason I think Patty the Batty gets it done this week is because again, Benasin is very forward... I do think he finishes Ben Wasanti here.
I think Cory Sandhagen is just more trustworthy... And for that reason, I think he's going to end up winning a decision.
So give me Looney Kavanaaugh to get it done. I think he ends up winning by knockout.
I do lean Terrence McKini, right? I tend to pick Terrence McKini because you just know what he can do.
I think that Nikita Kryov is the better side here... So, give me Nikita Kryov to get it done.
Ultimately though, I think Adrien Giannis... will put Cody Garbrandt out at some point... give me Giannis by knockout actually seems like free real estate.
I'd be shocked by any other outcome really. I think Luke Riley puts on a master class... Luke Riley wins by knockout.
Tracy Cortez is better... She's going to take Kong Wang down. He's going to keep her down... Give me Cortez to do enough to get it done.
So, give me pen to win this fight. I think he ends up winning by knockout.
Ryan Gandra looks poised to knock Zack Reese out pretty easily... I think Ryan Gandra is going to do that to a decent amount of guys.
So I'll take the Brazilian here. I think he's going to end up winning by knockout.
